task_completion.description: Create a 55 mm ground link anchored at the origin and constrained to the X-axis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line segment lying horizontally on the X-axis, starting from the origin point. A length constraint of '55' (or '55.00') should be visible next to it on the canvas or in the constraint list.

task_completion.description: Create an 18 mm crank link starting from the origin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line segment starting from the origin point with a length constraint of '18' (or '18.00') visible on the canvas or in the constraint list.

task_completion.description: Create a 32 mm rocker link starting from the second ground point
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line segment starting from the rightmost point of the 55mm ground link, with a length constraint of '32' (or '32.00') visible on the canvas or in the constraint list.

task_completion.description: Create a 64 mm coupler link connecting the crank and rocker
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line segment connecting the free ends of the crank and rocker links, forming a closed loop, with a length constraint of '64' (or '64.00') visible on the canvas or in the constraint list.

task_completion.description: Ensure the linkage remains mobile with unconstrained angles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that the four links form a closed quadrilateral and that there are no angle constraints (e.g., no fixed degree values like '90.00°') applied to the joints in the canvas or property browser.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SolveSpace window title bar displaying 'kinematic_linkage.slvs' or a save dialog showing the file being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the SolveSpace GUI to build the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent is actively using the SolveSpace graphical interface to draw and constrain the lines, rather than writing code in a terminal or text editor to generate the .slvs file.

Verify that the dimensions are actual SolveSpace constraints (typically shown in magenta/purple on the canvas or listed in the property browser) and not just text annotations or roughly drawn unconstrained lines.
Verify through the trajectory screenshots that the agent draws the lines and applies the constraints sequentially, rather than simply opening an already completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4-bar linkage must have the following exact dimensions: Ground link = 55.0 mm (on X-axis from origin), Crank = 18.0 mm (from origin), Rocker = 32.0 mm (from second ground point), Coupler = 64.0 mm (connecting crank and rocker). The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/kinematic_linkage.slvs'.
